title: astragalus urunguensis
intro: Astragalus urunguensis, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to China and Mongolia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Astragalus urunguensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus urunguensis can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
